title: Haemul Pajeon Seafood Pancake

seo.title: Haemul Pajeon Recipe: Authentic Korean Seafood Pancake
seo.metaDescription: Master the art of Haemul Pajeon with our authentic Korean seafood pancake recipe! Easy step-by-step guide to make this delicious dish at home. Perfect for any meal.
seo.h1: Authentic Haemul Pajeon (Korean Seafood Pancake) Recipe
h2Headings: How to Make Haemul Pajeon (Step-by-Step Guide)
Tips for the Perfect Korean Seafood Pancake
seo.imageAlt: Freshly made Haemul Pajeon, a crispy Korean seafood pancake, served with dipping sauce.
seo.imageCaption: Enjoy a taste of Korea with this homemade Haemul Pajeon, packed with fresh seafood and crisp vegetables.

description: Haemul Pajeon is a beloved Korean savory pancake, crispy on the outside and tender within, generously studded with fresh seafood and vibrant green onions. It offers a delightful harmony of oceanic flavors and a satisfying texture, making it a perfect appetizer or light meal. Enjoy this traditional dish with a tangy soy-based dipping sauce for an unforgettable culinary experience.

ingredients.notes: or glutinous rice flour for extra crispiness
cleaned, body cut into rings, tentacles chopped

instructions.title: Prepare Seafood and Vegetables
instructions.text: Thoroughly clean and prepare all seafood. Chop shrimp and squid into bite-sized pieces. If using mussels or oysters, ensure they are clean. Wash and trim green onions, cutting them into 3-inch lengths. Thinly slice the onion. Prepare the red chili for garnish if desired.

instructions.title: Make the Batter
instructions.text: In a large bowl, whisk together all-purpose flour, rice flour, cold water, egg, and salt until a smooth, lump-free batter forms. The batter should be somewhat thin, similar to crepe batter. Do not overmix, as this can lead to a tough pancake.

instructions.title: Prepare the Dipping Sauce
instructions.text: In a small bowl, combine soy sauce, rice vinegar, sesame oil, toasted sesame seeds, minced garlic, and gochugaru (if using). Stir well and set aside. This sauce perfectly complements the savory pancake.

instructions.title: Combine Ingredients for Pancake
instructions.text: Add the prepared seafood, green onions, and sliced onion to the batter. Gently fold to combine, ensuring the seafood and vegetables are evenly coated. Be careful not to mash the ingredients.

instructions.title: Cook the Pancakes
instructions.text: Heat a large non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Add about 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil, swirling to coat the pan. Pour about 1/4 of the batter mixture into the hot pan, spreading it evenly to form a thin, round pancake. Arrange a few red chili slices on top if desired.

instructions.title: Flip and Finish Cooking
instructions.text: Cook for 3-5 minutes until the bottom is golden brown and crispy. Drizzle a little more oil around the edges. Carefully flip the pancake and cook for another 3-5 minutes until the other side is golden brown and the seafood is cooked through. Repeat with the remaining batter.

instructions.title: Serve Immediately
instructions.text: Transfer the cooked Haemul Pajeon to a cutting board and slice into wedges. Serve hot with the prepared dipping sauce on the side. Enjoy this delightful Korean seafood pancake as an appetizer or a main dish.

tips: For an extra crispy pancake, use very cold water for the batter and add a tablespoon of ice cubes to the batter mixture just before cooking.
Experiment with different types of seafood like clams, oysters, or even thinly sliced octopus to customize your Haemul Pajeon.
Serve immediately after cooking to enjoy the best crispy texture. Reheating can make it less crispy, but a quick pan-fry can revive some crispness.
article: Haemul Pajeon Seafood Pancake is a beloved Korean Seafood dish enjoyed across Korean. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
